nota_scraping: Sitio WordPress + Divi Theme. Contenido extraído vía WP REST API y scraping del HTML. Algunas imágenes internas pueden estar incompletas por renderizado JS.

meta.title: Kara Day Spa - Massage | Facials | Wraps | Waxing | Nail Care
meta.description: Kara Day Spa services include deep-tissue massage, body treatments, facials, specialty treatments, waxing, natural nail care and gentleman's services.

logo.descripcion: Logo de Kara Day Spa integrado en el header del sitio

secciones.contenido: Experience the Kara Difference. Kara Day Spa is the quintessential place to relax while on business or leisure in downtown Greenville. It not only functions as a full-service salon with massage, nails and body wraps, but there are also on-site chiropractic services as well.

imagenes.descripcion: Hero background image showing spa relaxation

secciones.contenido: Guests are encouraged to relax on comfy chaise loungers and enjoy the stress-free environment at their leisure. Kara's licensed staff has many years of experience providing spa services while building lasting relationships. Visit our boutique for gifts, jewelry, candles, and decor.

Deep Tissue Massage — deep-tissue and neuro-muscular massage therapy. Medical Massage — $90 for 60 min. Prenatal Massage — $110 for 60 min. Relaxation Massage w/Tara — $85 for 60 min, $105 for 90 min. Sampler Massage — $45 for 30 min. Neuro-Muscular/Deep Tissue w/Tara. Chair Massage. Add-Ons: Kinesio Taping $8/area, Assisted Full Body Stretching $10.

The Kara Ultimate Facial — $180 — 90 minutes. Our most luxurious facial. Includes neck and chest treatment, hand, arm, neck and shoulder massage with a mask applied to hands and arms. Combination of techniques including microderm exfoliation, light therapy, and high-frequency. The Kara Relaxation Facial — $150. The Kara Wellness Facial — $120. Chemical Peels — starts at $125. Light Therapy — $100. The Kara Escape Facial — $80 — 30 min. Youth Facial — $85 (ages 13-18).
Ionic Foot Detox — $65. Body Glow — $80. Infrared Sauna Wrap — $80. Lumafirm Body Firm and Glow — $150. Note: Refrain from shaving or sunbathing 24 hours prior to treatments.

Pedicures are a true spa experience. For ultimate relaxation all pedicures are done in our private rooms while you recline with a lavender pillow and a beverage. The Kara Ultimate Pedicure — $90. Hot Stone Pedicure — soothing foot soak, warm stone massage on feet and calves, thorough exfoliation, nail conditioning/shaping/buffing/polishing.

Waxing Services: Brows $15, Brow Shaping $18, Half Leg $40, Full Leg $60, Arms $30, Underarms $25, Full Face $40, Nose $5, Lip $12, Bikini starts at $30, Brazilian starts at $60, Back starts at $50, Chin $15. Tinting Services: Lash Tinting (30 min) $30, Brow Tinting (15 min) $15. Note: Length of hair 1/4 inch, approximately 2-3 weeks of growth required. Retin-A, Differin, blood thinners may exclude clients.

Fitness Facial — $85 (1 hour) — deep cleansing, exfoliating scrub, deep pore cleansing, facial massage as well as shoulder and arm massage. Sports Pedicure — $60 (1 hour) — Calluses and cuticles are smoothed leaving feet refreshed then relaxed with a pressure point massage.

Features Tara Hazouri, practicing since 2001, who attended Sherman College of Chiropractic in Spartanburg, SC (2010). Combined chiropractic and massage approach targeting the intricate web that is our bodies.

Enhancements may be scheduled alone or added during facial, nail, and body wrap treatments. Includes eye treatments, foot and leg treatments, hand treatments. Aromatherapy Treatment $10, Stretching after Massage $10, Foot Massage $10.

The Kara Ultimate Package — $443 — 6 hours of spa treatments. The Kara Wellness Package — $184.50 — includes 60-minute wellness facial and 60-minute integrative massage with skin care samples. The Relaxation Package. The Kara Escape Package — $133 — The Kara Escape Facial and The Signature Integrative 30-Minute Massage. Packages enjoy a discount. Gratuity is not included.
Fall for Reflexology: Regular $80, Special $60. Micro Peel (series of 3): Regular $430, Special $300. AromaTouch: Regular $65, Special $45.

Cancellations, reschedules and time changes require 24 hours advance notice to avoid incurring the full appointment fee or voiding gift certificates. Arrive 5-10 minutes early to check in. Late arrivals will result in shortened services. Parking available in the back lot behind the spa on Academy Street, plus street parking on Lavinia Avenue. 15%-20% gratuity recommended. Inform therapist about any injuries, surgeries, medications, or medical conditions. Leave valuables at home and dress comfortably. Cell phones should be silenced.

Kara Spa Group was founded in 2005 by the mother-daughter team of Alicia Moreau and Korri Moreau Henson. Along with Tara Hazouri and Meredith Buras, they form a team at the core of Spa Services offered at Kara. With over 40 years of combined experience, these professionals offer exceptional service and quality care for their clients.

Spa Plate — $20 — A scoop of Chicken or Tuna Salad over a bed of mixed greens and vegetables. Includes a side of mixed fruit and crackers. Grilled Chicken Salad — $20 — Sliced grilled chicken, atop a bed of mixed greens and vegetables. Includes a side of mixed fruit and crackers. Charcuterie for One — $14 — Can add to any service. Includes a Mimosa cheese, nuts and fruit. Dressing options: Ranch, Balsamic Vinaigrette, Caesar. Beverages: Mimosa, Tea, Herbal Hot Tea, Water.

textos_clave.propuesta_valor: Kara Day Spa is the quintessential place to relax while on business or leisure in downtown Greenville. Our goal is to provide affordable luxury in a beautiful, tranquil environment, and exceed expectations every visit. Guests are encouraged to relax on comfy chaise loungers and enjoy the stress-free environment at their leisure. Kara's licensed staff has many years of experience providing spa services while building lasting relationships.

contacto.horarios: Solo con cita previa. Parking disponible en el lote trasero en Academy Street y estacionamiento en calle en Lavinia Avenue.

footer.contenido: Kara Day Spa — 105 Lavinia Ave, Greenville, SC 29601 — (864) 233-5352
